title: Business Analyst Fellowship
instructors: Arindam Mukherjeeteaches the curriculum in the first 4 weeks. He is the co-founder of NextLeap and was previously the head of consumer product and growth at Flipkart for almost 7 years. He holds a Harvard Business School MBA and is an alum of IIT Kharagpur, with close to 2 decades of experience in the technology industry.
Prashanth Bhaskaranis a product lead at Uber and was previously leading the data platform product at CRED. He teaches the Metrics module and also the Interview Prep module.
Sahil Agrawalis a Business Analytics Manager at Flipkart and teaches the Excel modules
Saksham Arorais a senior software engineer at Intuit and was previously a software engineer at Microsoft. He teaches the SQL modules.

Varun Talikotiis an AGM Revenue and Growth at Chai Point. He was previously working as Senior Manager, Planning and Performance at Swiggy. He has also worked at Flipkart in a Business Analytics role. He teaches Data Visualisation using Tableau  modules.
